basic_details.job_title: SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi National Park Borivali (SGNP Borivali)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi National Park Borivali (SGNP Borivali) Technical Advisor Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website MahaForest . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor Recruitment 2026. Candidates who are retired officers from Maharashtra Forest Department or Maharashtra Forest Development Corporation Ltd. from the post of Divisional Forest Officer (DFO) / Divisional Manager (DM) with minimum 10–12 years of relevant experience in the Forest Department are eligible to apply for these Technical Advisor vacancies. qualification.education_qualification: Retired officers from Maharashtra Forest Department or Maharashtra Forest Development Corporation Ltd. from the post of Divisional Forest Officer (DFO) / Divisional Manager (DM) with minimum 10-12 years of relevant experience in Forest Department
qualification.details: Retired officers from Maharashtra Forest Department or Maharashtra Forest Development Corporation Ltd. from the post of Divisional Forest Officer (DFO) / Divisional Manager (DM) with minimum 10-12 years of relevant experience in Forest Department.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and experience Personal Interview / Technical Presentation Final selection based on merit and suitability
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahaforest.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor position is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Technical Advisor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Advisor post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 50,000. This is a consolidated amount and is paid on a monthly basis as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for the Technical Advisor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired officers from the Maharashtra Forest Department or Maharashtra Forest Development Corporation Ltd. They should have held the position of Divisional Forest Officer (DFO) or Divisional Manager (DM) and possess at least 10-12 years of relevant experience in the Forest Department.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Advisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Technical Advisor in Sanjay Gandhi National Park Borivali. This is a single opening and the recruitment process will fill this position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the SGNP Borivali Technical Advisor recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and submit it via post or as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Technical Advisor position is contract-based. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure, as detailed in the official recruitment advertisement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualification and experience. This will be followed by a personal interview or technical presentation, and the final selection will be made based on merit and suitability.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates from all categories, including General and OBC, are not required to pay any fee to apply for the Technical Advisor position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Maharashtra Forest Department, which is www.mahaforest.gov.in. It is recommended to check the website regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at Sanjay Gandhi National Park Borivali, Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400066.
